data.html:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace AttendanceSystem.Models
{
    /// 
    /// Represents a device user/employee enrolled on the ZKTeco device.
    /// Biometric templates and profile photo are stored as binary columns
    /// to support fingerprint and face recognition workflows.
    /// 
    public class User
    {
        [Key]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.Identity)]
        public int UserId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(100)]
        public string Name { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(50)]
        public string EmployeeId { get; set; }

        [StringLength(255)]
        public string Email { get; set; }

        [StringLength(20)]
        public string PhoneNumber { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Department { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Position { get; set; }

        /// 
        /// Fingerprint or face biometric template (raw bytes from device).
        /// 
        public byte[] BiometricTemplate { get; set; }

        /// 
        /// User profile photo (typically JPEG captured at enrollment).
        /// 
        public byte[] ProfilePhoto { get; set; }

        public UserStatus Status { get; set; } = UserStatus.Active;

        public DateTime CreatedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;

        public DateTime? UpdatedDate { get; set; }

        // Navigation properties
        public virtual ICollection AttendanceRecords { get; set; }
        public virtual ICollection AccessLogs { get; set; }
    }

    /// 
    /// Represents a single attendance event (check-in or check-out)
    /// captured by the device and synced to the backend.
    /// 
    public class AttendanceRecord
    {
        [Key]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.Identity)]
        public long Id { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int UserId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public CheckinStatus Status { get; set; }

        [StringLength(50)]
        public string DeviceSerialNumber { get; set; }

        public VerificationType VerificationType { get; set; }

        /// 
        /// Confidence score 0-100 from the device's verification algorithm.
        /// 
        public int VerificationScore { get; set; }

        public byte[] CaptureedImage { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Notes { get; set; }

        public bool IsSynced { get; set; } = true;

        public DateTime SyncedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;

        [ForeignKey("UserId")]
        public virtual User User { get; set; }
    }

    /// 
    /// Access control log entries — captures both granted and denied events.
    /// 
    public class AccessLog
    {
        [Key]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.Identity)]
        public int Id { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int UserId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public AccessStatus Status { get; set; }

        [StringLength(255)]
        public string DeviceId { get; set; }

        [StringLength(255)]
        public string Location { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Reason { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Description { get; set; }

        [ForeignKey("UserId")]
        public virtual User User { get; set; }
    }

    /// 
    /// Daily attendance summary derived from AttendanceRecords.
    /// Updated automatically whenever new records arrive.
    /// 
    public class AttendanceSummary
    {
        [Key]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.Identity)]
        public int Id { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int UserId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public DateTime Date { get; set; }

        public DateTime? CheckInTime { get; set; }

        public DateTime? CheckOutTime { get; set; }

        public TimeSpan? WorkDuration { get; set; }

        public AttendanceStatus AttendanceStatus { get; set; }

        [StringLength(500)]
        public string Notes { get; set; }

        public DateTime CreatedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;

        public DateTime? UpdatedDate { get; set; }

        [ForeignKey("UserId")]
        public virtual User User { get; set; }
    }

    /// 
    /// Device registry — tracks all ZKTeco devices, their network config,
    /// firmware version, and current operational status.
    /// 
    public class Device
    {
        [Key]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.Identity)]
        public int Id { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(100)]
        public string SerialNumber { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(50)]
        public string Model { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(50)]
        public string FirmwareVersion { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(50)]
        public string IpAddress { get; set; }

        public int Port { get; set; } = 5200;

        public DeviceStatus Status { get; set; } = DeviceStatus.Online;

        public DateTime LastSyncedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;

        [StringLength(255)]
        public string Location { get; set; }

        public DateTime CreatedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;

        public DateTime? UpdatedDate { get; set; }
    }

    // ---------- Enums ----------

    public enum UserStatus
    {
        Active = 1,
        Inactive = 2,
        Suspended = 3,
        Deleted = 4
    }

    public enum CheckinStatus
    {
        CheckIn = 0,
        CheckOut = 1
    }

    public enum VerificationType
    {
        Fingerprint = 0,
        FaceRecognition = 1,
        CardId = 2,
        Password = 3,
        Multi = 4
    }

    public enum AccessStatus
    {
        Granted = 1,
        Denied = 2
    }

    public enum AttendanceStatus
    {
        Present = 1,
        Absent = 2,
        Late = 3,
        EarlyLeave = 4,
        HalfDay = 5,
        OnLeave = 6
    }

    public enum DeviceStatus
    {
        Online = 1,
        Offline = 2,
        Error = 3,
        Maintenance = 4
    }
}
